The House — Who I Am

✦ GSK Reddy · NIT Raipur

My Story

"Data tells stories. My job is to uncover them."

Started with engineering curiosity at NIT Raipur. Gained my first taste of real-world data at BSNL — experiencing how data is captured, evolved, and used in enterprise systems. That sparked a passion for analytics. Built 20+ dashboards across Excel, Power BI, and Tableau. Now building predictive models, cleaning complex 100K+ row datasets, and advancing through IIT Patna's AI/ML Program toward a career in Data Science and ML Engineering.

The Experience River

Career Journey

2025 · Internship
BSNL — Field Experience
An exploratory internship to experience firsthand how data is captured, structured, and evolved in enterprise telecom systems. Observed real-world TCP/IP infrastructure, network logging, and how data pipelines underpin national communications.
📡
🤖
2025 · Internship
InternPe — ML Intern
Machine learning project development, model evaluation frameworks, statistical analysis, and business insight reporting. Built end-to-end ML pipelines.
2025 · Certificate Program
IIT Patna — AI/ML Program
Advanced training in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Computer Vision under IIT faculty guidance. Hands-on model building and research projects.
🎓
🧬
Jun 2026 – Jul 2026 · Internship
AD Info — Data Scientist Intern
Built and evaluated a Heart Disease Prediction model end-to-end — data preprocessing, feature engineering, model selection using Python and Scikit-learn. Validated with accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score for reliable clinical predictions.
🚀
Leadership
Campus Ambassador — Devtown
Official Devtown representative at NIT Raipur. Organized tech events and mentored peers on programming and data science fundamentals.
Leadership
Core Coordinator — Sanskriti
Core coordinator of NIT Raipur's cultural committee. Led large-scale event planning, team coordination, and cross-functional execution.
